markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 25TH Roboracer AUTONOMOUS Racing Competition

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
October 13th |  Registration Opens  
October 29th, 10:00AM - 11:00AM ET | [Roboracer Orientation 1 ( Competition Rules overview )](https://upenn.zoom.us/j/95234024137?pwd=m0idq4IRdbn2Ck0l8PXyoqcSP6aLFg.1)  
[Slide](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1fqDEF9Wm2T_CmqZldNDa6zi0F-mzaSHdRLuecw_-5Wo/edit?usp=sharing) [Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1TCIqjgrt0zaT3agDqDVQQw4dPxObn86a/view?usp=sharing)  
November 5th | Video Demonstration Due  
November 5th, 10:00AM - 11:00AM ET | [Roboracer Orientation 2 ( Track set up, Track overview for in-person competition, Teams Training )](https://upenn.zoom.us/j/98425120819?pwd=27x7uzaI8QJtDs1Os4pZu9TH57RMWz.1)  
  
December 9th | Teams on-site registration and regulated practice sessions  
December 10th | Qualification Time Trials  
December 11th | Head-to-Head Tournament & Award Ceremony
